channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: July 11, 2026 — US strikes Iran after ship attack in Strait of Hormuz - CNN
item.description:
1. July 11, 2026 — US strikes Iran after ship attack in Strait of Hormuz  CNN
  2. Live updates: New US strikes on Iran and Gulf nations intercept attacks  CNN
  3. Iran War Live Updates: U.S. Launches Strikes After Iran Fires on Ship in Strait of Hormuz  The New York Times
  4. US strikes Iran, Tehran says Strait of Hormuz closed, Gulf states hit  Reuters
  5. Live updates: U.S. conducts another round of strikes on Iran as Trump, supreme leader exchange threats  CBS News

item.description:

item.title: Iran attacks ship, announces Strait of Hormuz is closed — and US strikes back in response - New York Post
item.description:

item.title: Ukraine war briefing: Zelenskyy decries housing of weapons in civilian area after Russian strike kills 10 - The Guardian
